text: A county or municipality that provides services under an agreement described by Section 521.009 (Program Regarding the Provision of Renewal and Duplicate Driver’s License and Other Identification Certificate Services) may collect an additional fee of up to $5 for each transaction provided that relates to driver’s license and personal identification certificate services only.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.428 — County or Municipal Fee

A county or municipality that provides services under an agreement described by Section 521.009 (Program Regarding the Provision of Renewal and Duplicate Driver’s License and Other Identification Certificate Services) may collect an additional fee of up to $5 for each transaction provided that relates to driver’s license and personal identification certificate services only.

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1059 (H.B.3050), Sec. 14, eff. September 1, 2017.*
